title: scConsensus: combining supervised and unsupervised clustering for cell type identification in single-cell RNA sequencing data
author: Ranjan, Bobby
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These RDS files resemble all data sets used to generate the results presented in the project "scConsensus: combining supervised and unsupervised clustering for cell type identification in single-cell RNA sequencing data". Analysis of the data sets is exemplified in the project github page at  https://github.com/prabhakarlab/scConsensus .
steps_raw: These RDS files resemble all data sets used to generate the results presented in the project "scConsensus: combining supervised and unsupervised clustering for cell type identification in single-cell RNA sequencing data". Analysis of the data sets is exemplified in the project github page at  https://github.com/prabhakarlab/scConsensus .
